components.Settings.plexWebhookDescripti: Automatically reset watched status when a placeholder trailer is played, preventing it from syncing to Trakt or other scrobbling services. Requires Plex Pass. Register the webhook in Plex under Settings → Webhooks.
components.Settings.plexsettingsDescript: Configure the settings for your Plex server. Agregarr scans, creates, and manages Collections and Hubs on your Plex server.

components.Settings.serviceSettingsDescr: Configure your {serverType} server(s) below. You can connect multiple {serverType} servers, but only one can be marked as default. Collections can override which server to use for downloads.
components.Settings.settingUpPlexDescrip: To set up Plex, you can either enter the details manually or select a server retrieved from <RegisterPlexTVLink>plex.tv</RegisterPlexTVLink>. Press the button to the right of the dropdown to fetch the list of available servers.
components.Settings.settingsSaveFailed: Failed to save watchlist sync settings
components.Settings.skipYoutubeTrailerDo: Use only the hardcoded placeholder video instead of downloading YouTube trailers. This dramatically speeds up placeholder creation, but placeholders will use a generic video instead of actual trailers.
components.Settings.tagWithUsernameDescr: Automatically tag downloaded media with the Plex username of the user who added it to their watchlist
components.Settings.tautulliSettingsDesc: Optionally configure the settings for your Tautulli server. Agregarr fetches watch history data for your Plex media from Tautulli.
components.Settings.toastMaintainerrSett: Something went wrong while saving Maintainerr settings.
components.Settings.toastMdblistSettings: Something went wrong while saving MDBList settings.
components.Settings.toastMyanimelistSett: Something went wrong while saving MyAnimeList settings.
components.Settings.toastPlaceholderSett: Something went wrong while saving placeholder settings.
components.Settings.toastPlexRefreshFail: Failed to retrieve Plex server list.
components.Settings.toastTautulliSetting: Something went wrong while saving Tautulli settings.
components.Settings.toastTraktSettingsFa: Something went wrong while saving Trakt settings.
components.Settings.toastYoutubeSettings: Something went wrong while saving YouTube settings.
components.Settings.traktBasicDescriptio: Use public Trakt features like trending, popular, and public custom lists. Just enter your Client ID.
components.Settings.traktBasicTip: Create an application at https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications/new with redirect URI urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob and copy the Client ID.
components.Settings.traktCodeInstruction: After approving access in the Trakt window, copy the code shown and paste it here to finish connecting.
components.Settings.traktCodeModalSubtit: Paste the code from the Trakt authorization window.
components.Settings.traktConnectFailed: Unable to start Trakt OAuth flow
components.Settings.traktCredsHint: Copy the Client Secret from your Trakt application at https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications (redirect URI: urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob).
components.Settings.traktOAuthBenefits: Access private lists, watchlists, and recommendations.
components.Settings.traktOAuthDescriptio: Enable Trakt OAuth for access to private lists
components.Settings.validationApiKey: You must provide an API key
components.Settings.validationHostnameRe: You must provide a valid hostname or IP address
components.Settings.validationPortRequir: You must provide a valid port number
components.Settings.validationUrl: You must provide a valid URL
components.Settings.validationUrlBaseLea: URL base must have a leading slash
components.Settings.validationUrlBaseTra: URL base must not end in a trailing slash
components.Settings.validationUrlTrailin: URL must not end in a trailing slash
components.Settings.watchlistsyncDescrip: Automatically sync Plex watchlists from Seerr users and add items to Radarr and Sonarr. Requires Seerr to be configured. NOTE: Seerr has this functionality built in, however it recognises placeholder files as being available, and doesn't request the item.
components.Settings.webAppUrlTip: Optionally direct users to the web app on your server instead of the "hosted" web app
components.Settings.youtubeCookiesFoundB: YouTube cookies are configured, but YouTube trailer downloads are disabled below
The {cookiesPath} file is configured, but the "Skip YouTube Trailer Downloads" option is enabled. YouTube trailers will not be downloaded even though cookies are available.
components.Settings.youtubeCookiesFoundM: The {cookiesPath} file is configured and will be used for YouTube trailer downloads.
components.Settings.youtubeCookiesNotFou: The {cookiesPath} file was not found in your config directory. Without this file, YouTube trailer downloads may fail due to bot detection.
components.Settings.youtubeSettingsDescr: Recommended: Set up YouTube cookies to prevent bot detection and IP bans when downloading trailers for placeholder feature. Once banned, adding cookies may not be enough to unban you (from downloading youtube videos without being signed in)
components.Settings.youtubeSetupStep1: Install a browser extension to export cookies: {firefoxLink} / {chromeLink}
components.Settings.youtubeSetupStep2: Visit YouTube while logged in to your account
components.Settings.youtubeSetupStep3: Export cookies and save as {cookiesPath} in your Agregarr config directory
components.Setup.signinMessage: Get started by signing in with your Plex account
components.UserList.importedfromplex: {userCount} Plex {userCount, plural, one {user} other {users}} imported successfully!
components.UserList.importfromplexerror: Something went wrong while importing Plex users.
components.UserList.newplexsigninenabled: The Enable New Plex Sign-In setting is currently enabled. Plex users with library access do not need to be imported in order to sign in.
components.UserList.nouserstoimport: There are no Plex users to import.
pages.dashboardDescription: Overview of your Agregarr statistics and collection performance
pages.homeDescription: Collections and Hubs on the Home screen. Ordering is shared between Home and Recommended views, but can have separate visibility settings.
pages.libraryDescription: Collections in the Library tab. Ordering in the Library tabs can be independent from the Home/Recommended views.
pages.recommendedDescription: Collections and Hubs in the Recommended tabs. Ordering is shared between Home and Recommended views, but can have separate visibility setings.
